title: UE Lessons Courses Configuration
description: Course definitions used by the ue-lessons report command.

$schema.description: Path or URI of this JSON Schema, used by editors for validation and completions.

courses.description: Courses to include in console output and the generated PDF report. Leave empty until a course has been configured.

course.title: Course
course.description: One course whose exercise lessons contribute raw points toward a grade-point scale.

name.description: Display name printed in reports and listed in the PDF table of contents.

target_grade_points.description: Grade points to evaluate in the target calculation. Defaults to 1 when omitted.

grade_scale.description: Thresholds translating achieved raw-point percentages into grade points.

lessons.description: Lessons in chronological order. Missing trailing lessons are automatically added as full-score projections using schedule, or the default twelve-lesson schedule when schedule is omitted.

schedule.title: Automatic Lesson Schedule
schedule.description: Optional lesson schedule used to validate configured maxima and create missing trailing lessons as full-score projections. When omitted, the default is 12 lessons worth 6 points each except lessons 6 and 11, which are worth 2 points.

lesson_count.description: Total number of lessons in this course after automatic projections are added.

default_max_points.description: Default maximum raw points for each lesson unless overridden by a point override.

point_overrides.description: Optional point overrides for numbered lessons whose maximum differs from the default.

schedulePointOverride.title: Schedule Point Override
schedulePointOverride.description: An override for the maximum raw points of a particular scheduled lesson.

lesson_number.description: One-based lesson number to override; it must not exceed schedule.lesson_count.

max_points.description: Maximum raw points available for this lesson instead of schedule.default_max_points.

gradeThreshold.title: Grade Scale Threshold
gradeThreshold.description: A minimum achieved percentage and the grade points awarded at that threshold.

minimum_percentage.description: Minimum portion of raw points required, expressed between 0 and 1; for example, 0.6 means 60%.

grade_points.description: Grade points awarded when the required percentage is achieved.

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.description: A single exercise lesson with available and achieved raw points.

max_points.description: Maximum raw points available in the lesson.

earned_points.description: Raw points earned or expected for a projected lesson. It must not exceed max_points.

projected.description: Whether the lesson is a future estimate rather than a confirmed result. Defaults to false.
